name: python3-pynput
title: python3-pynput
description:
control and monitor input devices (Python 3)
This library allows you to control and monitor input devices. Currently, mouse
and keyboard input and monitoring are supported.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pynput because control and monitor input devices (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pynput as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pynput with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pynput --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
